US: US1: As a coach who frequently messages clients, I want to save and quickly insert predefined responses in chats, so that I can respond faster and maintain consistency in my communication without typing the same messages repeatedly
AC: AC1: Add Saved Response button in Editor nav
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Navigate to Inbox conversation
3. Verify Editor nav
Title: Saved Responses button exists
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses button next to GIF button

Title: tooltip on hover
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Saved Responses" on hover

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Navigate to Inbox conversation
3. Click Saved Responses button
4. Verify modal
Title: modal displayed on click
Expectation: - SHOULD display Saved Responses modal

Title: X button exists
Expectation: - SHOULD display X button in modal header

Title: X button / Esc closes modal
Expectation: - SHOULD close modal on X click or Esc

Title: Search box exists
Expectation: - SHOULD display Search box

Title: Create new button in top-right
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Create new" button in top-right corner

Title: tooltip on hover
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Create New" on hover

Step:
1. Click Create new button
2. Verify behavior
Title: navigate to AC5 popup
Expectation: - SHOULD open Create Saved Response popup (AC5)

Title: empty list message
Expectation: - SHOULD display "{image} Your saved responses list is empty. Start by creating your first one to save time during chats." when no saved responses exist

Step:
1. Create saved responses
2. Verify list structure
Title: list structure with sections
Expectation:
- SHOULD display list of saved-response items below Search box
- SHOULD show list of titles on left-side
- SHOULD show message detail of selected response on right-side

Title: order by latest updated time
Expectation: - SHOULD order saved responses by latest updated time

Title: FREQUENTLY USED section hidden when empty
Expectation: - SHOULD hide FREQUENTLY USED section when no frequently used saved responses exist

Step:
1. Use saved responses multiple times
2. Verify FREQUENTLY USED section
Title: top 5 most-used responses
Expectation:
- SHOULD display top 5 most-used saved responses in FREQUENTLY USED section
- SHOULD show all available responses if fewer than 5
- SHOULD sort by usage_count descending, then by title A-Z when usage_count is equal

Title: ALL section with all responses
Expectation:
- SHOULD list all saved responses in ALL section
- SHOULD sort by title A-Z

Title: first response selected by default
Expectation: - SHOULD select first saved response in list by default

Step:
1. Use Up/Down arrow keys
2. Verify navigation
Title: arrow-key navigation
Expectation: - SHOULD allow navigation between responses using Up/Down arrow keys

Title: message detail display
Expectation: - SHOULD display {title} and {message_detail} on right-side

Step:
1. Hover over message detail
2. Verify 3-dot button
Title: 3-dot button on hover
Expectation: - SHOULD show 3-dot button on hover over message detail

Step:
1. Add long message to saved response
2. Verify scrolling
Title: scrolling for long messages
Expectation: - SHOULD allow scrolling when message is long

Title: hover preview of message detail
Expectation: - SHOULD show message detail on hover over title

Title: click title fills chatbox
Expectation: - SHOULD fill message in chatbox on click (refer to AC8)

Title: pagination with 20 items per load
Expectation:
- SHOULD load 20 items initially
- SHOULD display Load more on scroll
- SHOULD load next 20 items on scroll

Title: footer shortcut display
Expectation: - SHOULD display shortcut list in footer

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses popup
3. Verify Search box
Title: default placeholder
Expectation:
- SHOULD be empty by default
- SHOULD display placeholder "Search saved response"

Step:
1. Focus to Search box
2. Verify placeholder
Title: focus placeholder change
Expectation: - SHOULD change placeholder to "Enter keyword..." on focus

Title: x icon when inputting
Expectation: - SHOULD display x icon when inputting text

Title: clear text by backspace / x icon
Expectation:
- SHOULD remove text on backspace or x icon click
- SHOULD show full list after clearing

Title: search starts from 1 char
Expectation: - SHOULD start searching from 1 character

Step:
1. Input search keyword
2. Verify search scope
Title: search in title and message
Expectation:
- SHOULD search based on title and message fields
- SHOULD return all responses where either field contains keyword

Title: case-insensitive partial match
Expectation:
- SHOULD match case-insensitive
- SHOULD match partial keyword anywhere in field

Step:
1. Search with no matches
2. Verify result display
Title: no results found message
Expectation: - SHOULD display "Search results (0)" below Search box

Step:
1. Search with matches
2. Verify result display
Title: search results with count
Expectation:
- SHOULD display "Search results ({number_of_matched_results})" below Search box
- SHOULD show list of results same as AC2
- SHOULD select first result by default

Title: pagination in search results
Expectation:
- SHOULD load 20 items initially
- SHOULD display Load more on scroll
- SHOULD load next 20 items on scroll

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses popup
3. Click 3-dot button on saved response
4. Verify submenu
Title: submenu with Edit/Delete options
Expectation: - SHOULD display submenu with "Edit response" and "Delete response" options

AC: AC5: Add a new saved response
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses popup
3. Click Create new button
4. Verify popup
Title: Create Saved Response popup
Expectation: - SHOULD display Create Saved Response popup

Title: popup title
Expectation: - SHOULD display title "Create Saved Response"

Title: X button exists
Expectation: - SHOULD display X button

Title: X button closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close popup on X click

Title: TITLE field with icon
Expectation: - SHOULD display icon next to field title

Title: tooltip on icon hover
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Used to organize responses. This wonʼt appear in messages.." on hover

Title: TITLE field required and empty
Expectation:
- SHOULD be required field
- SHOULD be empty by default
- SHOULD display placeholder "Name this response for easy search"

Step:
1. Input all character types
2. Verify acceptance
Title: TITLE allows all characters
Expectation: - SHOULD allow all characters

Title: TITLE 140 char limit via type/paste
Expectation:
- SHOULD allow maximum 140 characters
- SHOULD prevent input beyond 140 characters when typing
- SHOULD cut off and paste first 140 characters when pasting text over 140

Title: MESSAGE field required and empty
Expectation:
- SHOULD be required field
- SHOULD be empty by default
- SHOULD display placeholder "Write the full message you want to send to clilents"

Title: MESSAGE allows any characters
Expectation: - SHOULD allow any characters

Title: MESSAGE text-formatting disabled
Expectation: - SHOULD not allow text-formatting

Title: clear formatting on paste
Expectation: - SHOULD clear text-formatting on paste

Title: MESSAGE 10,000 char limit via type/paste
Expectation:
- SHOULD allow maximum 10,000 characters
- SHOULD show character count as "{X}/10000"
- SHOULD prevent input beyond 10,000 when typing
- SHOULD cut off and paste first 10,000 characters when pasting text over 10,000

Title: Cancel button always enabled
Expectation: - SHOULD be always enabled

Title: Cancel closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close popup on click

Title: Save button disabled by default
Expectation: - SHOULD be disabled by default

Step:
1. Input in TITLE only
2. Verify Save button
Title: Save remains disabled with partial input
Expectation: - SHOULD remain disabled when only one field has input

Step:
1. Input in both fields
2. Verify Save button
Title: Save enabled with both fields
Expectation: - SHOULD enable when both TITLE and MESSAGE have input

Step:
1. Fill both fields
2. Click Save
3. Verify result
Title: Save creates new response
Expectation:
- SHOULD add new saved response to list
- SHOULD display toast "New Saved Response created." on success

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses popup
3. Click 3-dot button
4. Click Edit response
5. Verify popup
Title: Edit Saved Response popup
Expectation: - SHOULD display Edit Saved Response popup

Title: popup title
Expectation: - SHOULD display title "Edit Saved Response"

Title: X button exists
Expectation: - SHOULD display X button

Step:
1. Click X with no changes
2. Verify behavior
Title: X closes popup when no changes
Expectation: - SHOULD close popup when no changes made

Step:
1. Make changes
2. Click X
3. Verify Discard popup
Title: Discard Changes popup on X with changes
Expectation: - SHOULD show Discard Changes popup when changes made

Title: Discard popup content
Expectation:
- SHOULD display title "Discard Changes?"
- SHOULD display text "Are you sure you want to go? Changes have not been saved yet."

Step:
1. Click Cancel / X in Discard popup
2. Verify behavior
Title: Cancel / X closes Discard popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close Discard popup on Cancel or X click

Step:
1. Click Discard Changes button
2. Verify behavior
Title: Discard Changes closes without saving
Expectation:
- SHOULD close Discard popup
- SHOULD return to previous page without saving changes

Title: TITLE pre-populated
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate with existing shortcut

Title: other behaviors same as AC5
Expectation: - SHOULD keep same behaviors as AC5 for TITLE and MESSAGE fields

Step:
1. Edit fields
2. Click Save
3. Verify result
Title: Save updates response
Expectation:
- SHOULD update saved response
- SHOULD display toast "Saved Response updated successfully."

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses popup
3. Click 3-dot button
4. Click Delete response
5. Verify popup
Title: Delete confirmation popup
Expectation: - SHOULD display confirmation popup

Title: popup title and text
Expectation:
- SHOULD display title "Delete Response?"
- SHOULD display text "This response will be permanently deleted and canʼt be recovered. Are you sure you want to proceed?"

Title: Cancel closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close popup without deleting

Title: OK deletes response
Expectation:
- SHOULD close popup
- SHOULD delete response
- SHOULD display toast "Saved Response deleted." on success

AC: AC8: Add saved response to chat box by selecting an item in Saved Response popup
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open Saved Responses popup
3. Click title / hit ENTER
4. Verify chatbox
Title: append message via click/ENTER
Expectation:
- SHOULD append full message content to chatbox
- SHOULD place message behind current text if any

US: US2: As a coach who frequently messages clients, I want to create a saved response from a message in the conversation, so that I add a new saved response quicker
AC: AC1: Add "Save this response" button to Coach's non-text message
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Navigate to conversation with Coach's non-text message
3. Hover over message
4. Verify button
Title: button between 3-dot and Reply
Expectation: - SHOULD display button between 3-dot and Reply buttons for Coach's non-text messages

Title: tooltip on hover
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip "Saved this response" on hover

Title: click opens AC5 popup
Expectation: - SHOULD open Add Saved Response popup on click

Step:
1. Navigate to conversation in Free plan
2. Hover over message
3. Verify button visibility
Title: hidden in Free plan
Expectation: - SHOULD NOT show button when workspace is not in Pro/Studio plan

Step:
1. Navigate to conversation in Pro/Studio plan
2. Hover over message
3. Verify button visibility
Title: shown in Pro/Studio plan
Expectation: - SHOULD show button when workspace has Pro or Studio plan

AC: AC2: Add new saved response from the conversation
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Navigate to conversation
3. Hover over Coach's message
4. Click "Save this response" button
5. Verify popup
Title: popup with adjusted title
Expectation:
- SHOULD display popup same as AC1 above
- SHOULD adjust title to "Add To Saved Responses"

Title: TITLE blank
Expectation: - SHOULD leave Title field blank

Step:
1. Verify MESSAGE field with normal message
2. Verify with 10,000+ char message
Title: MESSAGE pre-populated from Coach's message
Expectation:
- SHOULD pre-populate MESSAGE with Coach's message
- SHOULD cut to first 10,000 characters if message exceeds 10,000

Step:
1. Fill TITLE field
2. Click Save
3. Verify result
Title: Save adds new response
Expectation:
- SHOULD add message as new saved response
- SHOULD display toast "Response has been saved"
